description_long: This is a modern, compact SUV with a streamlined, aerodynamic body finished in a clean white color. The vehicle features a panoramic sunroof, visible from the top, and has four passenger doors with flush handles. The front end is equipped with a wide grille and angular headlights, while the rear showcases sleek taillights and a subtle roof spoiler. The side profile reveals alloy wheels with a multi-spoke design and black trim along the windows and lower body. The windows are tinted, and the overall design suggests a focus on both style and urban practicality.
description: A sleek, white compact SUV with a panoramic sunroof, alloy wheels, and modern styling details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, angular headlights, and a glimpse of the panoramic sunroof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, alloy wheels, and the full length of the panoramic sunroof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sleek taillights, roof spoiler, and rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, wheels, and sunroof from the opposite side.
attribute_wheel_design: five double-spoke alloy wheels with a silver metallic finish
